title: Corpus and retrieval visibility (umbrella) (was jssm#857)
manager: The umbrella for making FSL/jssm visible to the models themselves — retrieval, corpus, and training-data presence (was jssm#857). The thesis: developers increasingly ask a model, not a search engine, so if the models don't know FSL, FSL doesn't exist. This coordinates every task that gets the language into what models can see and cite.
